title: QoL Enhanced Vanilla Experience
description: This is the mods I use for vanilla enhanced Minecraft
body:
This Modpack aims to improve and enhance the atmosphere of Minecraft.

This Modpack is designed to add enchanced visuals, adds animations to the player and the mobs, shows more details about items, adds icons for visual details.

It also adds some multiplayer chat improvements, improved sounds, and has some preformance mods as well.

It is a Quality of Life Modpack

I will be updating it and adding to it to add to the enchanced atmosphere of Minecraft.

If you have any ideas to add to the Modpack, you can tell me on my discord server:
[Discord Server](https://discord.com/invite/vb6ZQd5FH6)

Full List of Mods in Modpack:
(All Credit goes to the original mod creators)
